command_kor: 입구에 움직임이 감지될 때마다 입구 조명을 최대밝기로 켰다가 3초 뒤에 꺼줘.
command_eng: Whenever motion is detected at the entrance, turn on the entrance light at maximum brightness and then turn it off after 3 seconds.
gt_raw:
{"name": "", 
"cron": "", 
"period": 100, 
"script": "
prev := (#Entrance #MotionSensor).Motion

curr = (#Entrance #MotionSensor).Motion

if (prev == false and curr == true) {

    (#Entrance #Light).MoveToLevel(100, 0)

    delay(3
 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).Off()

}

prev = curr"}
gt:
{"name": "", 
"cron": "", 
"period": 100, 
"script": "
prev := (#Entrance #MotionSensor).MotionSensor_Motion

curr = (#Entrance #MotionSensor).MotionSensor_Motion

if (prev == false and curr == true) {

    (#Entrance #Light).LevelControl_MoveToLevel(100, 0)

    delay(3
 SEC)

    (#Entrance #Light).Switch_Off()

}

prev = curr"}
